title: phpBB
description: phpBB is a free, open-source flat-forum bulletin board software for building and running an online community discussion board.
installation: Uses the actively-maintained bitnami/phpbb image, which bundles Apache + PHP and only supports MariaDB/MySQL (phpBB does support PostgreSQL upstream, but this image does not), so the mariadb add-on is shipped. On first boot the container runs the phpBB installer non-interactively against the MariaDB add-on, creating the admin account from PHPBB_USERNAME / PHPBB_PASSWORD / PHPBB_EMAIL. ROTATE the admin password (PHPBB_PASSWORD, currently a placeholder) and the mariadb add-on credentials (db/user/password all default to 'phpbb') before going to production, then log in at /adm to harden settings. PHPBB_HOST is wired to the public host via {{KUBERO_APP_HOST}} so generated links use the live URL. Persistent data (config, uploads/attachments, avatars, cache) lives under /bitnami/phpbb on the mounted volume. Configure SMTP via the board's ACP or PHPBB_SMTP_* env vars for outbound email. ALLOW_EMPTY_PASSWORD is disabled.
